Fudgy Brownies: Melt 3/4 cup (170g) unsalted butter with 1 1/2 cups granulated sugar in a medium saucepan over low heat, then remove from heat and whisk in 3/4 cup unsweetened cocoa powder and a pinch of salt. Allow to cool slightly, then beat in three large eggs and 1 teaspoon vanilla, followed by 3/4 cup all-purpose flour; do not overmix. Pour batter into a greased 9x13 inch pan and bake at 325°F (165°C) for 22–25 minutes — a toothpick should come out with moist crumbs, not clean batter. Cool completely in the pan before cutting for the cleanest slices.
